prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 2GR-FKS 3.5L V6 (from Lexus RC F) with a custom dry-sump system by Moroso, paired with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (1.15 A/R turbine housing) and a Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate for 850whp on E85 fuel. Forged internals include JE Pistons (2618 alloy, 9.5:1 compression), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft by Callies. The fuel system features dual Bosch Motorsports 044 pumps, ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering surge tank with AN-10 lines.

Custom 6-speed sequential transmission by Holinger (RD60) with a Sachs twin-disc carbon clutch and a Quaife ATB differential. The drivetrain is reinforced with a Cusco 2-way LSD and a custom driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch chromoly). Suspension consists of Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, custom spherical bearing control arms by SuperPro, and a full poly bushings kit from Whiteline. Braking is handled by AP Racing CP9430 calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 380mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS3000 pads.

Full custom ECU tuning via Motec M150 with a bespoke calibration by Syvecs, including launch control, flat-foot shifting, and traction control with 12-stage adjustability. The cooling system features a PWR radiator with dual SPAL fans, a Setrab oil cooler, and a custom intercooler core by Garrett (1200cfm airflow). Exhaust is a custom 3.5-inch titanium system by Burns Stainless with a secondary catalytic converter delete and a straight-pipe design for maximum flow.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Rocket Bunny (UX-specific kit, PB-C013), including extended fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser with integrated gurney flaps. The hood is a custom carbon fiber unit by Seibon with a central ram-air scoop and heat extractors. Side skirts are replaced with a custom 3D-printed ABS design by Liberty Walk, featuring integrated LED running lights and air curtains for brake cooling.

Custom aero package by APR Performance, including a GT500-style rear wing with dual carbon fiber endplates and a 3-position adjustable angle (0°, 12°, 20°). The front bumper is modified with a custom splitter by Varis, featuring canards and a central dive plane for downforce. The rear features a custom diffuser by Aimgain with integrated exhaust exits and vortex generators. Wheels are custom forged 19x10.5 ET25 (front) and 19x12.5 ET40 (rear) by Work Emotion CR Kiwami in a matte bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear).

Interior stripped and replaced with a full FIA-spec roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, chromoly steel), Sparco Pro 2000 seats with 6-point harnesses by Schroth, and a custom carbon fiber dashboard by AIM Motorsport with a 12-inch digital display. The steering wheel is a custom suede-wrapped unit by NRG with integrated paddle shifters and a quick-release hub. The floor is replaced with a carbon fiber panel by Carbonetic, and the door cards are custom 3D-printed units with integrated fire suppression system controls by Lifeline.
